dungeon: ROTF owner-TEST of a COMMUNITY-MADE custom dungeon (~155s; on-screen overlay 'There is custom dungeon made by Maks (owner)', player 'VoltriPlay'). A 'Fire Ghost' boss in a lava-brick corridor arena, with rough/repetitive broken-English taunts. Owner/admin chat ('muffin hax', 'banned', trade spam) dominates. base-vs-canonical UNCERTAIN -> likely WIP/player-made content, NOT confirmed official ROTF; flagged, recorded honestly.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+bossends+f_: the Fire Ghost arena is a RED LAVA-BRICK corridor/channel layout (vertical lava-brick lanes with molten gaps between, b003_108s) -> long narrow lava channels (dodge corridors), not an open arena. The run also passes a PURPLE grid area (t001, shop/staging?) and a GREEN grass realm (t003); an ICE/BLUE arena appears in the b002 window. Multi-dungeon; the custom Fire Ghost dungeon = lava-brick corridors.

bosses.name: Fire Ghost
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (b003_108s): scattered/loose WHITE bullets in the lava-brick corridor -> basic spread/scattered (no clean geometric ring/spiral; small bullet count). Approximate.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-coloured 'Fire Ghost', grayscale-pull). Taunts are HEAVILY REPEATED + broken English ('dont understand LEAVE OR LEAVE...' spammed; 'I WILL DESTROY YOU' / 'J DESTROY YOU') -> reads like WIP/placeholder text for a player-MADE dungeon ('made by Maks (owner)', owner-tested by VoltriPlay). base-vs-canonical UNCERTAIN: this may NOT be official ROTF content -> FLAGGED, do NOT build/enrich as canonical without confirmation. A possible 3rd line 'I will burn a(n) unholy de[ath]...' was too garbled to confirm -> NOT recorded.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: an OWNER TEST of a community/player-MADE custom dungeon ('custom dungeon made by Maks (owner)') -> ROTF appears to support player-made dungeons that owners test live. Admin activity in chat: 'muffin hax' + 'banned' (an owner banning a hacker mid-stream) + trade spam ('X wants to trade with you. Type /trade'). The 'Fire Ghost' boss spams its taunts. No loot/drop line cleanly captured (a crate-grid loot screen appears in b002).
uncertain: base-vs-canonical of the 'Fire Ghost' dungeon is UNCONFIRMED -> it is a player-MADE ('by Maks') custom dungeon being owner-tested, so it may be WIP / non-official; the taunts are repetitive broken-English (possible placeholder) -> FLAGGED, not treated as canonical. High chat red-density (0.9) was partly the LAVA floor + the spammed red boss text. Attack geometry approximate (scattered white bullets, no clean pattern). A 3rd garbled Fire Ghost line not recorded (illegible). Owner/trade/ban chat = not boss content.
